category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to Kosovo.

title.en: China-to-Kosovo Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (RAEPC / EU-RED)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入科索沃：RAEPC / EU-RED合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入科索沃：RAEPC / EU-RED合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Kosovo RAEPC requirements under the transposed EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU), covering CE marking with Declaration of Conformity, EN/ETSI harmonised radio and EMC standards, electrical safety for 230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F, EU Authorised Representative or Kosovo local importer registration, and cybersecurity obligations under Kosovo data-protection law and RED Article 3(3).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与科索沃RAEPC在转化实施欧盟《无线电设备指令》（RED 2014/53/EU）下要求的差距对照，涵盖附符合性声明的CE标志、EN/ETSI协调无线电及电磁兼容标准、电气安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插头）、欧盟授权代表或科索沃本地进口商注册，以及科索沃数据保护法和RED第3(3)条项下的网络安全义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與科索沃RAEPC在轉化實施歐盟《無線電設備指令》（RED 2014/53/EU）下要求的差距對照，涵蓋附符合性聲明的CE標誌、EN/ETSI協調無線電及電磁相容標準、電氣安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插頭）、歐盟授權代表或科索沃本地進口商登記，以及科索沃資料保護法和RED第3(3)條下的網路安全義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, RAEPC type acceptance, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Kosovo regulations, applicable EN/ETSI harmonised standards adopted under RAEPC, labelling requirements, and market-entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Kosovo.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、RAEPC型式认可、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于科索沃销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行科索沃法规、RAEPC采用的适用EN/ETSI协调标准、标注要求及市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、RAEPC型式認可、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於科索沃銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行科索沃法規、RAEPC採用的適用EN/ETSI協調標準、標注要求及市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: Kosovo has transposed EU RED (2014/53/EU) into national law via RAEPC; CE marking with a Declaration of Conformity against EN/ETSI harmonised standards is mandatory for wireless/radio equipment — no separate national radio certificate is required beyond CE. An EU Authorised Representative or Kosovo-based local importer must be appointed and registered with RAEPC. Electrical safety must meet EN IEC 62368-1 for 230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F. Cybersecurity obligations apply under Kosovo data-protection law and RED Article 3(3) for internet-connected devices. CCC is not recognised; SRRC test reports are not substitutable for EN/ETSI testing; GB standards are not accepted.
answer_first.zh: 科索沃已通过RAEPC将欧盟RED（2014/53/EU）转化为国内法；无线/无线电设备须强制加贴CE标志并附具针对EN/ETSI协调标准的符合性声明——CE之外无需单独国家无线电证书。须指定欧盟授权代表或科索沃本地进口商并向RAEPC登记。电气安全须符合EN IEC 62368-1（230V/50Hz/C/F型插头）。网络安全义务适用于科索沃数据保护法及RED第3(3)条所涵盖的联网设备。CCC不被认可；SRRC测试报告不可替代EN/ETSI测试；GB标准不被接受。
answer_first.zht: 科索沃已通過RAEPC將歐盟RED（2014/53/EU）轉化為國內法；無線/無線電設備須強制貼附CE標誌並附具針對EN/ETSI協調標準的符合性聲明——CE之外無需單獨國家無線電證書。須指定歐盟授權代表或科索沃本地進口商並向RAEPC登記。電氣安全須符合EN IEC 62368-1（230V/50Hz/C/F型插頭）。網路安全義務適用於科索沃資料保護法及RED第3(3)條所涵蓋的聯網設備。CCC不被認可；SRRC測試報告不可替代EN/ETSI測試；GB標準不被接受。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on major RAEPC / EU-RED regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed requires named reviewer sign-off.
